title: Ranachandi
subTitle: Sahana falls in love with Naveen. Later, she is sent to jail for a crime she did not commit and waits to exact revenge from the culprit.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Parvati exchange garlands during the wedding ceremony. Later, Lord Shiva expresses his gratitude to Himavan for offering his daughter's hand in marriage. How will Himavan react to this expression of gratitude?

title: Toss
subTitle: Toss is a 2017 Indian Kannada romantic comedy film written, directed and co-produced by Dayal Padmanabhan. The film stars Vijay Raghavendra, Sandeep and Ramya Barna in the lead roles.The film, under the banner of D Pictures and Om productions, was launched by Puneeth Rajkumar on 27 January 2012. After being in development for more than 5 years, the film is set to release on 21 July 2017.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: As Parvati journeys towards Kailash alongside Lord Shiva, memories of her past life as Sati flood her mind, evoking a deep sense of nostalgia and reflection. Meanwhile, in the realm of the Asuras, a search ensues for a suitable bride for Tarakasura.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Parvati rejoice as the ten Rishis prepare to perform the sacred act of circumambulation around them as a gesture of reverence. However Parvati's joy turns to dismay when Rishi Bhringi declines to pay homage to her, causing her to feel.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
subTitle: Rocky, a young man, seeks power and wealth in order to fulfil a promise to his dying mother. His quest takes him to Mumbai, where he gets involved with the notorious gold mafia.

title: Grama Devathe
subTitle: Angala Parameswari, an avatar of Goddess Parvati, wants to protect the people of Earth. Kaveri, her ardent follower, seeks her help when her life is in danger.

title: Sye
subTitle: Chakri, who dreams to become a police officer, falls for a woman named Kannika. But things change when Mosale, a corrupt policeman, provokes him to fight.

title: Kanti
subTitle: A Marathi woman, Reema, and a Kannadiga man, Kanti, fall in love. Their romantic story takes a political turn when Samblekar, a Maharashtrian politician, wants to exploit the situation.

title: Chandra Chakori
subTitle: Puttaraju and Sevanthi fall in love with each other. Sevanthi's father puts forth a condition for their marriage which Puttaraju must fulfil.

title: Minchina Ota
subTitle: Two petty thieves rope other small-time criminals into their get-rich-quick schemes and attempt to steal cars for a living.

title: Minchina Ota
subTitle: Two petty thieves rope other small-time criminals into their get-rich-quick schemes and attempt to steal cars for a living.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Mainadevi becomes displeased with Lord Shiva for bestowing Shivastra upon Tarakasura, despite the joyous occasion of Lord Shiva and Parvati completing their wedding ceremony.

title: Gadiyara
subTitle: The search for an ancient treasure unearths dark secrets about an old royal family. As the case progresses, individuals from different walks of life work together to find the truth.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Rishi Bhringi fumes with rage and announces his intention to separate Lord Shiva and Parvati. Meanwhile, Lord Shiva is disappointed and instructs Rishi Bhringi to rectify his mistake by accepting the truth.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Shambuki and Diti, driven by dark motives, conspire to invite Lord Shiva and Parvati to Tarakasura's wedding. Despite Shiva's refusal, Parvati accepts Diti's invitation. Will evil prevail over good?

title: Chandra Chakori
subTitle: Puttaraju and Sevanthi fall in love with each other. Sevanthi's father puts forth a condition for their marriage which Puttaraju must fulfil.

title: Vaalee
subTitle: Deva falls obsessively in love with his twin brother's wife and stops at nothing to separate the two in order to win her.

title: Hettavara Kanasu
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: A.K.47
subTitle: Framed by friends for an arms' deal and the commissioner's murder, an innocent Ram is jailed. Escaping prison, he sets out on a daring quest to clear his name and prove his innocence.

title: Kirik Party
subTitle: Karna, a first-year engineering student, falls in love with Saanvi, a final-year pupil from his college. However, a tragic event changes his perception towards life and he mends his ways.

title: Nan Magale Heroine
subTitle: A struggling filmmaker after his back to back flops finally finds a producer willing to fund his next movie. However, he has a condition that the director has to cast his daughter as the heroine.

title: Nan Magale Heroine
subTitle: A struggling filmmaker after his back to back flops finally finds a producer willing to fund his next movie. However, he has a condition that the director has to cast his daughter as the heroine.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati prepares herself to depart with Lord Shiva after their wedding ceremony. Meanwhile, Mainadevi becomes emotional and bursts into tears as she bids farewell to Parvati. Can Parvati console her before she departs?

title: Prayanikara Gamanakke
subTitle: A bus ferrying a motley of passengers gets hijacked en route to Hyderabad. Later, the police and passengers face multiple challenges to overcome the situation.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva's anger flares when Shambuki and Diti insult Goddess Parvati for her infertility and reject her blessings. Will the Goddess be able to soothe the furious Lord's temper?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati joins Lord Shiva on a pilgrimage to Amarnath, seeking blessings for a child. However, their journey is threatened by Tarakasura's malevolent scheme, as he sends Rahu and Ketu to obstruct them.

title: Kirik Party
subTitle: Karna, a first-year engineering student, falls in love with Saanvi, a final-year pupil from his college. However, a tragic event changes his perception towards life and he mends his ways.

title: Ganga Yamuna
subTitle: Greed drives a married woman with children to force her husband into marrying a rich woman. As she enjoys her newfound wealth, she realises that her family find comfort in the company of the new wife.

title: Hettare Hennane Herabeku
subTitle: Jyothi, raised by a misogynist father, grows up to be a rebel and embarks on a crusade against those people who devalue women, making it her mission to empower the opressed.

title: Moorkha
subTitle: Movie starring Kashinath, Namratha, Bhavya and directed by A N Jayaramaiah.

title: BAHUBALI THE BEGINNING
subTitle: A tribal-raised boy learns he is Mahishmati royalty, discovers his father's bravery, and aims to overthrow the current king.

title: Plus
subTitle: Jai decides to protect himself from his enemies. To everyone's surprise, he recruits a team of people with various psychological disorders to help him.
